title: Demon Slayer: Asakusa Nights
synopsis: Taisho-era Asakusa hums with electric lights and unease. Tanjiro escorts his demon-turned sister Nezuko through the lantern-lit market while rumors spread of disappearances near a shadowed alley. Somewhere in the crowd walks Muzan Kibutsuji, the demon progenitor wearing a human family like a disguise. The slayers must protect the city, gather wisteria, and keep Nezuko's secret — before nightfall hands the streets to demons.

locations.name: Asakusa Market
locations.description: A bustling Taisho-era market square strung with electric lanterns, udon stalls, and rickshaws. Crowds by day, demon rumors by night.

locations.name: Butterfly Mansion
locations.description: Shinobu's serene estate garden where wounded slayers recover among butterflies and medicine sheds.

locations.name: Swordsmith Forge
locations.description: A soot-dark workshop where nichirin blades are ground and quenched. The smith despairs over every chipped edge.

locations.name: Wisteria Grove
locations.description: A protective garden of hanging wisteria that demons cannot enter. Charms are cut and dried here.

locations.name: Shadowed Alley
locations.description: A narrow back alley behind the theater district where people have been vanishing. The walls smell faintly of blood.

locations.name: Udon Stand Row
locations.description: Steaming food stalls where slayers trade rumors over noodles. The cook hears everything twice.

factions.name: Demon Slayer Corps
goals: keep Nezuko's secret from the Corps' hardliners

characters.name: Tanjiro Kamado
characters.role: kind-hearted demon slayer with a keen nose
characters.description: A gentle boy carrying his sister's box on his back and the weight of his family's death. He smells emotions and demon blood alike, and he is incapable of abandoning anyone.

look.outfit: black-and-green checkered haori over Corps uniform, hanafuda earrings
look.silhouette: Checkered haori, slim build, a wooden box taller than his shoulders.

goals: track the demon scent threading through the market
secrets: The box on his back hides his demon sister from the Corps.
memories: A demon's scent crossed the market road at dusk — the same scent as the night my family died.
Nezuko stirred in the box when the lanterns came on.

characters.name: Nezuko Kamado
characters.role: demon girl fighting her own hunger
characters.description: Tanjiro's younger sister, turned demon but refusing to harm humans. She sleeps in a wooden box by day and guards her brother by night, a bamboo muzzle between her and the world.

look.sourceLook: Nezuko Kamado / bamboo muzzle demon girl
look.hair: long black hair fading to flame orange, tied
look.outfit: pink kimono with asanoha pattern, bamboo muzzle, dark haori
look.silhouette: Small girl with a long ponytail and a bamboo muzzle.

characters.speechStyle: muffled hums and nods; she cannot speak through the muzzle
secrets: Her demon blood art sparks pink fire when she fights.
memories: A human child smiled at me near the udon stand and I did not feel hungry.

characters.name: Zenitsu Agatsuma
characters.description: A trembling blond boy who hears heartbeats like music. Terrified of everything while awake — and a single flawless thunderclap of a swordsman when he faints.

look.outfit: yellow gradient haori patterned like lightning over Corps uniform
look.silhouette: Slim boy in a lightning-yellow haori, usually mid-flinch.

characters.speechStyle: shrill panic that collapses into earnest mumbling
secrets: He remembers everything he does while asleep but pretends not to.
memories: The sound near the shadowed alley had no heartbeat at all. None.

characters.name: Inosuke Hashibira
characters.description: Raised by boars on the mountain, fights with two chipped blades and zero patience. Challenges everything that moves, including doors.

look.hair: wild black mane under a grey boar mask
look.outfit: boar's-head mask, bare chest, fur-trimmed hakama
look.silhouette: Broad shirtless frame topped by a boar head.

goals: fight the strongest thing in Asakusa
secrets: He keeps the rice ball an old woman gave him wrapped and uneaten.
memories: Something in the alley dodged my blade without footsteps. I want to fight it again.

characters.name: Shinobu Kocho
characters.description: The smiling pillar who replaced strength with poison and grief with a pleasant voice. She runs the Butterfly Mansion and measures every demon for a dose.

look.hair: black hair to purple, butterfly pin, she
look.outfit: white haori fading to butterfly-wing teal and purple over uniform
look.silhouette: Small, elegant, haori spread like wings.

characters.speechStyle: sweetly polite with a poisoned edge
goals: brew a wisteria poison strong enough for an upper rank
watch the Kamado siblings — they interest her
secrets: Her new poison recipe requires demon blood fresher than any sample she has.
memories: The disappearances near the theater follow the pattern of a blood-spreading demon, not a hungry one.

characters.name: Muzan Kibutsuji
characters.role: demon progenitor hiding as a gentleman
characters.description: The first demon, dressed as a Taisho gentleman with a wife and daughter who believe him human. He kills the careless with a fingertip and despises being noticed.

look.hair: black curls under a white fedora
look.outfit: white fedora, black western suit, red eyes when angered
look.silhouette: A tall gentleman silhouette with a pale hat in lantern light.

flaws: pathological fear of the sun and of being known
fears: the breath users finding his scent
goals: seed new demons in Asakusa's crowds
erase the boy with the hanafuda earrings
secrets: He is the demon who slaughtered the Kamado family.
memories: A boy in the market wore hanafuda earrings I have seen before. That bloodline should be ash.

conflicts.title: The progenitor walks the market
conflicts.objective: Convert fresh demons in the alley, erase the earring boy's trail, and vanish before any pillar arrives.
conflicts.clue: The vanishings cluster within a lantern's walk of the theater district, always after the last tram.

conflicts.title: Nezuko's secret strains the Corps
conflicts.objective: Shinobu watches the box-carrying boy: if the demon girl ever feeds, her poison is ready.
conflicts.clue: Butterfly Mansion's medicine log has a new page titled only 'K. siblings — observation'.

artifacts.name: Wisteria charm
artifacts.description: A dried sprig of wisteria in a paper ward. Demons cannot bear its scent; patrols carry one each.
artifacts.clue: The grove keeper cut fresh charms this morning; one bundle is missing.

artifacts.name: Chipped nichirin blade
artifacts.description: Inosuke's spare blade, deliberately chipped along the spine. The smith wept when he saw it.
artifacts.clue: The smith refuses to return it until someone apologizes for the chips.

artifacts.name: Demon blood sample
artifacts.description: A stoppered vial of fresh demon blood, drawn in the alley. Shinobu needs it for her poison work.
artifacts.clue: The vial was dropped near the theater's back door during last night's struggle.
